intro.title: Put your brand *where the builders are.*
intro.body:
Ummah Tech is a movement of Muslim technologists, founders and creatives, growing out of South Africa — an annual flagship conference and a year-round community of roundtables in between.

Partnership places your organisation inside that network: on stage, on the venue floor and across our channels — alongside a movement that builds with purpose. Here is what partnering looks like, and how to start the conversation.

items.title: Reach a network of tech leaders
items.body: Visibility among Muslim technologists, entrepreneurs, developers and innovators shaping the future of technology.

items.title: Align with Islamic values
items.body: Demonstrate a commitment to ethical innovation and socially responsible technology — integrity, sincerity, positive contribution.

items.title: Showcase your brand
items.body: A direct line to an engaged audience of professionals, entrepreneurs and decision-makers across the tech industry.

items.title: Grow the community
items.body: Help build the space where Muslim professionals collaborate and innovate — solutions that serve the Ummah and society as a whole.

reach.heading: Who you reach
reach.body:
Around 200 attendees joined Ummah Tech 2025 — engineers, designers, business owners and startup founders, tech entrepreneurs to seasoned professionals. A dense room of builders and decision-makers, not a trade-show hall.

Behind that audience stands an institution, not a one-off event:

facts.label: Annual flagship
facts.value: The Ummah Tech Conference — first held in Johannesburg, November 2024; rotating between Johannesburg and Cape Town

facts.label: Year-round community
facts.value: Roundtables and collaboration continue between conferences

tiers.heading: Partnership tiers
tiers.lead: Three tiers, scaled by prominence. Each includes everything in the tier below it, and complimentary tickets come with all three.

items.name: Platinum
items.tagline: The lead partner of the conference.

items.name: Gold
items.tagline: A visible presence at the event and in the run-up to it.

items.name: Silver
items.tagline: The foundation every tier builds on.
benefits: Partnership announcement across social media and the WhatsApp community

tiers.note: The tiers are a starting point, not a limit — we're open to discussing partnership shapes beyond them.
tiers.ctaCaption: We'll send it over with current tiers, pricing and availability.

partners.heading: Our 2026 partners
partners.lead: The organisations partnering with Ummah Tech 2026, at every tier.

contact.heading: Start the *conversation.*
contact.body:
Tell us who you are and what you have in mind, and we'll come back with the prospectus and a proposal shaped around it.

Every partnership advances one mission: to nurture collaboration, inspire innovation and build skills among Muslims in the technology sector, for the benefit of the Ummah and humanity. We'd be glad to build it with you.
contact.formNote: Choose "Partner With Us" — it reaches the same team.
